title: Nonogram Studio
description: Solve and create Picross/Nonogram puzzles — 5 built-in puzzles, custom editor, hints, timer, and shareable URLs.
concept: A full-featured Nonogram (Picross) puzzle app. Solve 5 hand-crafted puzzles from 7×7 to 15×15, use hints when stuck, check for errors, and track your best times. Switch to the editor to paint your own puzzle solution and share it via a URL hash with friends.
features: Left-click fill, right-click mark X, undo/redo stack
Hint system (3 per puzzle) + error-check button
Countdown timer with localStorage best times
Custom puzzle editor with URL hash sharing

interaction.click: Left-click = fill · right-click = mark X · middle = clear
interaction.touch: Tap to fill, two-finger tap to mark X
